assets.purpose: Gate dimensions the guardian uses to pass or block a pristino-calibration output (persona line, mode shape, optimizer sections, Canvas, evidence, precedence, delegate integrity, guardian block, degraded path, no green-as-success, single-brand). Maps 1:1 to evals/evals.json expected_checks.
Deterministic MODE(+COMPLEXITY) -> output shape table (persona_line, sections, canvas) so the lead and guardian agree on what mode-correct means.
